query:
SELECT 
  id,
  projectNumber,
  clientName,
  totalAmount,
  status,
  quotationId
FROM projects
WHERE deletedAt IS NULL 
  AND dataOrigin = 'manual'
  AND quotationId IS NULL
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
